title: agropyron cristatum subsp. dasyanthum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. dasyanthum, commonly known as crested wheatgrass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. dasyanthum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and respiratory issues.
